Author: KKT
Name: SoundMixer
Punchline: Advanced FFXIV Sound Effect Volume Mixer
Description: 【国际 Global 构建】Per-SCD-path volume control: groups, Glob, presets, live monitor, blacklist, BGM/ambient, IPC, debug hooks. PlaySound off by default. 0–350% gain. Commands: /soundmixer, /smix
Changelog: 0.2.3.0: PlaySound disabled by default (confirmed CTD). UI SFX fix, Clear Cache, Guideroid grace & mount BGM, group tree UX. See in-app changelog.
FeedbackMessage: Please include steps to reproduce and the sound path if reporting a matching issue.
